query:
UPDATE "ob-poc".investors
            SET lifecycle_state = 'KYC_APPROVED',
                kyc_status = 'APPROVED',
                kyc_approved_at = NOW(),
                kyc_risk_rating = COALESCE($2, kyc_risk_rating),
                lifecycle_notes = $3,
                updated_at = NOW()
            WHERE investor_id = $1
            RETURNING investor_id
